records.v: Became agitated three times during walk and turned back. Later complied and returned carefully.

Fearful response of turning around near her enclosure after two rounds and not listening to mahouts command. nAfter few minutes of stationing near same place and restraint she started listening to mahouts command and safely walked back to her enclosure
Agitated during walk for 100 meters. In middle near Bapu singh’s enclosure corner area. She got normal after mahouts command.
Walked outside with new mahout. Constantly scanning environment by sniffing. Following mahouts command properly and walking
